findings.evidence: `ThreeCycle.lean:59` defines `abbrev threeCycleMeasure : Measure (ZMod 3) := uniformOn Set.univ`; `mathlib/Mathlib/Probability/UniformOn.lean:94-95` has `instance instIsProbabilityMeasure_uniformOn_univ [Finite Ω] [Nonempty Ω] : IsProbabilityMeasure (uniformOn (.univ : Set Ω))`.
findings.fix: Delete this instance and let typeclass search use `ProbabilityTheory.instIsProbabilityMeasure_uniformOn_univ`.
findings.issue: The `IsProbabilityMeasure threeCycleMeasure` instance duplicates Mathlib's existing instance for `uniformOn Set.univ`, since `threeCycleMeasure` is only an abbrev for `uniformOn Set.univ`.

summary: The PR adds one direct duplicate instance for the uniform-on-univ probability measure; the rest of the example does not appear to duplicate existing exchangeability or shift APIs.
